description: A dark, dimmed designed graphic over a photo of a crowded airport security line. Large text reads 'Highest TSA WAIT TIMES IN HISTORY' with a blue banner beneath reading 'DUE TO THE DEMOCRAT SHUTDOWN'. A small italic line at the bottom cites a source, and a Department of Homeland Security seal is centered.
notable_text: Highest TSA WAIT TIMES IN HISTORY; DUE TO THE DEMOCRAT SHUTDOWN
